records.ety: [OE. titel, titil, apparently a dim. of tit, in the sense of small; cf. G. tüttel a tittle, dim. of OHG. tutta teat. Perhaps, however, the same word as title, n.]

defs: A particle; a minute part; a jot; an iota.
quotes: It is easier for heaven and earth to pass, than one tittle of the law to fail.
Every tittle of this prophecy is most exactly verified.
